<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/sw.php', [ 'formats' => [ 'L' => 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', ], ]);
